function.name: askQuestions
function.arguments: {"questions": [{"header": "POC scope", "question": "Before I start, which scope best matches the invoice-processor POC you want for Lloyd’s of London?", "message": "Planned flow after you confirm: I’ll read project context from `BRIEF.md` if present, then invoke **ARCH** to design the architecture and produce `ARCHITECTURE.md`, pause for your approval on the proposed stack/cost/tracks, then fan out **INFRA + DEV** per architecture track, run quality gates and **QA**, generate **DIAGRAM**s, package **DOCS**, and finish with **REPO** for secret scan + push readiness.", "options": [{"label": "Lean demo", "description": "Core happy path only: ingest invoice, extract fields, route for approval, basic audit trail.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Business-ready POC", "description": "Adds human-in-the-loop review, exception handling, role-based access, and stronger auditability."}, {"label": "Stretch POC", "description": "Includes integrations, advanced analytics, and broader workflow coverage."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Tech and delivery constraints", "question": "Which implementation constraints should I optimize for?", "message": "Pick the closest fit, or add freeform details like preferred language, Azure services, auth requirements, timeline, or budget.", "options": [{"label": "Microsoft-first Azure", "description": "Prefer Azure-native services, managed identity, Entra ID, and low-ops components.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Fastest build", "description": "Optimize for speed of delivery, even if some choices are less enterprise-aligned."}, {"label": "Custom stack", "description": "You’ll specify language/framework/services in freeform input."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Data and compliance expectations", "question": "How should I treat invoice data and compliance for this POC?", "message": "This affects architecture, storage, and approval workflow design.", "options": [{"label": "Synthetic/sample data only", "description": "No real customer data; simplest compliance posture.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "PII-sensitive POC", "description": "Assume sensitive invoice data and stronger controls/audit requirements."}, {"label": "Need guidance", "description": "I want ARCH to propose the right compliance posture for the demo."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}]}
